keyword: best gps tracker for outdoor cat
title: Best GPS Tracker for Outdoor Cats (Lightweight & Weatherproof)
meta: Trackers built for roaming outdoor cats — light, weatherproof, with enough battery for a night out.
intro: Outdoor cats roam for hours. The tracker must be light enough not to annoy them and sealed against weather.

sections.body: Keep under ~20g so the cat ignores it.
IP67 keeps out rain; outdoor cats don't come in for storms.
Look for 2-3 days so a late return doesn't mean a dead tag.

faq.a: Yes — breakaway prevents snag injuries outdoors.
Coverage drops under dense canopy; expect last-known-point.
